description: 43 patches across Feeld, FolderSync, Hidrate Spark, Meetup, Met Office, Tinder, and X, plus universal PairIP license-check bypass, universal OneTrust consent-banner auto-reject, and universal MITM patches (trust user CAs + bypass OkHttp pinning). v1.2.0 adds Feeld (co.feeld): tracking-SDK removal ('Disable AppsFlyer tracking', 'Disable Braze tracking', 'Block tracking hosts (okhttp)' — drops analytics egress to *.appsflyer.com / *.braze.eu / *.amplitude.com / ep2.facebook.com) and 'Unblur profile photos'. Purchase-breaking Tinder paywall patches, the umbrellas, and the native-PairIP-blocked X (12.4.1) patches are default-off.
